name: DataPulse Analytics
description: DataPulse provides marketing analytics dashboards for mid-market e-commerce companies. Founded in 2022, reached product-market fit in 2024 with 120 paying customers. Revenue has plateaued at €1.2M ARR for 8 months. The team is focused on maintaining existing features and responding to customer support tickets. No new product initiatives in 6 months.
current_challenges: Revenue plateau at €1.2M ARR for 8 months
Churn rate increased from 3% to 5% monthly
Team morale declining — no exciting projects
Two senior engineers left in the last quarter
past_innovations: Launched real-time dashboard feature (2023) — drove initial growth
Attempted enterprise tier (2024) — failed due to missing compliance features
Considered expanding to social media analytics — shelved due to resource constraints
strategic_goals: Launch at least one AI-powered feature
